# Robots.txt for Bits and Bytes IT Solution
# https://www.bitsandbytesitsolution.com
# Digital Marketing Agency in Noida, Delhi NCR & All India

# Allow all search engines to crawl the site
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Allow: /about-us
Allow: /services
Allow: /services/
Allow: /web-development/
Allow: /app-development/
Allow: /ui-ux/
Allow: /ecommerce/
Allow: /projects
Allow: /blogs
Allow: /contact-us

# Disallow admin and authentication pages
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /*.json$
Disallow: /node_modules/

# Crawl delay for all bots (be polite)
Crawl-delay: 1

# Google specific rules
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 0

# Google Image Bot
User-agent: Googlebot-Image
Allow: /img/
Allow: /*.webp$
Allow: /*.avif$
Allow: /*.jpg$
Allow: /*.jpeg$
Allow: /*.png$
Allow: /*.svg$

# Bing specific rules
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

# Bing Image Bot
User-agent: msnbot-media
Allow: /img/

# Yahoo specific
User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

# DuckDuckGo
User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

# Yandex
User-agent: Yandex
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

# Baidu
User-agent: Baiduspider
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

# Facebook crawler for Open Graph
User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /

# Twitter card crawler
User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /

# LinkedIn crawler
User-agent: LinkedInBot
Allow: /

# Pinterest crawler
User-agent: Pinterest
Allow: /

# Block bad bots
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

User-agent: DotBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: BLEXBot
Disallow: /

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://www.bitsandbytesitsolution.com/sitemap.xml

# Host directive (some crawlers use this)
Host: https://www.bitsandbytesitsolution.com
